# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that runs directly on the master node for faster execution. The pipeline performs builds, runs tests, and deploys to production. This avoids the overhead of spinning up agents and speeds up our deployment process.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent {
        node('master') // Runs on master node for faster execution
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                // Build the project using your preferred build tool (e.g., Maven, Gradle)
                sh 'mvn clean install'
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                // Run tests using your preferred testing framework and tool
                sh 'mvn test'
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                // Deploy the artifact to production (You should use appropriate deployment commands for your environment)
                sh 'ssh username@production_server "scp target/your-artifact.jar username@production_server:/path/to/deployment/directory"'
            }
        }
    }
}
